item.title: To be fair it is one kind of tie!
item.description:
I’m the only teacher in my building who always wears a tie. Professional ties, Garcia ties, cartoon ties, old ties (as in 1970-80s hand-me-downs), funky ties, ugly ties,…and well, you get the picture. I own over 130 ties. Almost all of them given to me. I believe I’ve paid for four. Well, there is one tie I wear that my students look for every day, a solid black tie. I only wear them on test days. The reasoning I tell my students a test is as professional as a Black Tie Affair. Whenever a student sees me with a black tie on and it is not for their class their eyes get big and ask panically, “DO WE HAVE A TEST?” I have now classically conditioned them to fear my ties. As a side note, we have finals. I also dress up for that. I’ve gone to the GoodWill and got a tuxedo. So on finals I wear that and my students laugh at it. TL;DR I wear black ties on test days and my kids are afraid of them now.
Proof of my collection!
item.dc:creator: Hotsauceman

item.title: Being nice to people is free. There's so much hate on this earth. Gotta look after your fellow man
item.dc:creator: Srajo101

item.title: Active addiction vs 9 yrs in recovery!!
item.description:
Rock bottom April 3rd 2014
April 2022 Recovery is possible and every single person struggling out there deserves it and can achieve it ❤ Edit: Its hard for me to reply to everyone when I only have 140 characters. Heroin (fentanyl) was my drug of choice. Addiction runs heavy and deep on both sides of my family. My dad died of an overdose in 08. It hit me extremely hard. Thank God he died before I got strung out. Ill never stop thanking God for that. I got detained once in 13 and then full blown arrested in the first part of 14. The DA thankfully recommended treatment court at sentencing. I completed it in 2019. My county has an excellent program and our POs also are real hard asses. I needed that rigid structure at that time. It helped me maintain accountability. It also re taught me the life skills I was lacking. Not even a traffic violation after that lol What would I tell my former self: Theres not a damned thing I could tell myself during that time. Treatment court saved my life. No doubt abt it. At that point, death would have been a blessing to me. I kept my addiction hidden from public as long as I could. I was tired. Ready for change I couldnt bring abt on my own. I dont regret anything except the pain I caused my loved ones and my contribution to the overall shittiness of my community. I love and value myself 100% more now than I did before I even tried heroin. Heroin was never the problem. The problem was my lack of self;esteem and self worth. I wasted so much time making the mistakes it took to finally meet and love my real self. Thanks for all the love and support! No thanks to the ppl calling me ugly names. Ive seriously read some of the mean ones to my grandmother (who came to every single treatment court meeting with me) and were all laughing abt them
item.dc:creator: Clydesayzso

item.dc:creator: luutarhuri

item.title: Sibling Drama
item.description: #hospice #bigfamilyproblems EDIT 2: Guys! (And gals/ghouls/gremlins) I said I wanted to vent to Usersub! But you assholes banded together to get me to Most Viral. Thank you. ? My mother died of cancer when I was 3. Dad struggled to provide for all of us younger kids. He hated “assistance” and fought hard to not be on it. So he was unable to save. As of December, I was promoted and I now make more than my siblings. I have no spouse, no kids, and no mortgage. I owe him as much to give him a wonderful resting place when he couldn’t do so for mom. I don’t want bragging rights over him. I just know if he could, he’d have sold anything to bury me. He’s the only parent I remembered. EDIT: He just passed. I’m thankful he’s no longer in pain. Im going to go somewhere he’d love and toast my coffee to his memory. I just need to vent into the Usersub void. I’m the youngest of what was at one point nine kids. We are familiar with death and the funeral home is a familiar place, but I knew this would hit different. I’m planning on paying the $12k bill myself since my two oldest siblings are greedy and would hold it over everyone’s heads until they pass. Plus I knew my oldest sister would claim the $10k burial fund we all agreed to set aside from the sale of our grandmother’s house was spent paying the taxes and repairs on dad’s shithole house. A house that honestly should have been condemned since 2005. To be honest, I want to disappear from my family for a long while after dad passes. I know at least the two oldest will fight over his possessions. I’m washing my hands of them for a while. His slow decline is breaking me and I’ve told him today he doesn’t have to fight anymore.
item.dc:creator: Schmaron

item.title: The 101st vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dump - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 4 - Misc Sound dotGifs
item.description:
First off are some Interweb Classics for ya!
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild each Mon - Thu between 11am and Noon EST, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's new "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. PRO FACT: I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones.
No, I don't actually call them MeeMays, OR DO I?!?!
Sorry, I don't have part 4
If anyone has the one that doesn't cut off where this one does, PLEASE link in the comments
#Dump #Meme_Dump #Phone_Dump #Sound_On #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #EatingAppsTakingNaps #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #EatNamesAndTakeAss #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #HitlerAteBigBagsOfDicks #IfYoureDeadInside #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten (DK Dump) @CodyBurkett (Pippin) @AbbiiStabbii (Images Of Note) @DigiT00l @DumpsterKoala @OhVallyOfPlenty @CeleryMan7 As promised, only the last 50ish Dumperoos: Vol 50 https://imgur.com/gallery/k67M01GVol Vol 51 https://imgur.com/gallery/nXUSEtU Vol 52 https://imgur.com/gallery/ySPYez7 Vol 53 https://imgur.com/gallery/LSplkEf Vol 54 https://imgur.com/gallery/sI6JnEV Vol 55 https://imgur.com/gallery/ChYA12H Vol 56 https://imgur.com/gallery/G5dE3Om Vol 57 https://imgur.com/gallery/yRvJuRE Vol 58 https://imgur.com/gallery/rLK5Y1q Vol 59 https://imgur.com/a/iELzZ66 -Removed from gallery for one "offensive" image Vol 60 https://imgur.com/gallery/kCMzVTP - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: District 9 (2009)
item.description:
Violence ensues after an extraterrestrial race forced to live in slum-like conditions on Earth finds a kindred spirit in a government agent exposed to their biotechnology.
After the feature film based on the Halo: Combat Evolved (2001) video game series (which was to have been directed by Neill Blomkamp) fell through, producer Peter Jackson went to Blomkamp and offered him $30 million to make whatever he wanted, although this would be Blomkamp's first feature as a director. The result is this film.
The language used by the aliens (clicking sounds) was created by rubbing a pumpkin.
The title is a nod to a real place and a real incident. District 6 was a mixed race neighbourhood of Cape Town which the apartheid government demolished in 1966 to make room for whites.
Star Sharlto Copley had not acted before and had no intention of pursuing an acting career. He stumbled into the leading role as director Neill Blomkamp placed him on camera during the short film.
The film is banned in Nigeria because the government felt the film portrayed Nigerians as gangsters and cannibals.
All the shacks in District 9 were actual shacks that exist in a section of Johannesburg which were to be evacuated and the residents moved to better government housing, paralleling the events in the film. Also paralleling, the residents had not actually been moved out before filming began. The only shack that was created solely for filming was Christopher Johnson's shack.
Sharlto Copley ad-libbed all his lines during the "documentary" sequences. Copley and Jason Cope improvised their dialogue in other scenes.
The idea of the prawns being obsessed with cat food came from two inspirations. In impoverished areas of Johannesburg, director Neill Blomkamp would see people selling cheese poofs and other snack foods out of large three-foot tall bags and wanted the aliens to have a similar cheap food. The decision to make them cat food came from one of the producers who used canned cat food to bait traps when fishing for prawns in Vancouver.
The first documentary-style film to be nominated for Best Picture Oscar.
Two Toyota Hiluxes were "weaponised" into MNU armoured "gun trucks" by Weta's vehicle and engineering department crew. One truck survived the shoot, while the other was destroyed for the scene where a power-suited Wikus flips the truck (Wikus was added digitally, but the truck flip itself was a physical effect).
https://www.imdb.com/title/tt1136608/?ref_=ttmi_tt
item.dc:creator: Indiefoo

item.title: Men Are Victims Too
item.description: A domestic survivor is finally taking her abuser to court. This poor woman had a cigarette put out on her face, a finger cut off, slaps and punches were part of her normal day, the man defecated in her bed while his friends laughed. There are audio and pictures to back all of this up. There were doctors that witnessed some of the abuse. The man put makeup on to imitate bruises for pictures and court appearances, but the next day there were no bruises to be seen￼. The man tried so so so hard to ruin this woman’s life. The media didn’t even ask her side. They blamed her drinking as the problem (she had been sober for YEARS but the violent relationship had led her back to her addiction, her only escape) the man leaked a picture of her asleep with ice cream melted on her to prove how “out of control” she was. To shame her even more. All of her past partners have stepped up to support her, all saying she was nothing but kind and loving. How can we treat domestic abuse survivors this way?? This woman isn’t a woman, she’s Johnny Depp, and the man is Amber Heard. For some reason his abuse wasn’t taken serious, it was mocked. If he were a woman would it have been so openly mocked? Abuse is Abuse. We need to protect victims regardless of gender. #JusticeForJohnnyDepp #AmberHeardIsAnAbuser
item.dc:creator: mfrybeasley

item.title: Freshly Stolen Memes - A Dump for Paul #20
item.description: Dog tax of Louie. Louie belonged to Paul (from the title!) who is dying of lung cancer. He has been given 6 months. He is in dire straits financially since he cannot work and only recently got approved for Medicade. (He is 36 and has 2 kids). He has sold his possessions of value and this fundraiser is a last resort option for him. He needs money for medical bills, rent, prescriptions, food, and eventually end of life expenses. If you are of a giving mind or have recently been possessed by a charitable ghost, he has recently set up a PayPal fundraiser here >> https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8IwCPIC0xc (Previous fundraiser was here https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8HFMSlCe6u) ***EDIT - Wow, I posted this and went to sleep, and am now waking up to most viral and many comments and some donations! Woo-hoo! Thank you guys so much, every dollar donated makes a difference! Seriously, even a $2.50 donation makes a difference because it means he can buy a gallon of milk, or two boxes of Mac and cheese, etc. thank you guys, so much ❤️ I’ll be digging into the individual comments on my lunch break. Please get any weird/new lumps and bumps on yourself checked, get weird coughs checked, and get a yearly physical if you can, it might save your life. Previous Dumps for Paul 1 - https://imgur.com/gallery/K0dLkFj 2- https://imgur.com/gallery/S2tHMzN 3- https://imgur.com/gallery/0vwotvp 4- https://imgur.com/gallery/63ld6W5 5 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KZM2YJk 6- https://imgur.com/gallery/pHlA2CO 7-https://imgur.com/gallery/dBm3gVd 8-https://imgur.com/gallery/43RiEnM 9-https://imgur.com/gallery/SOkxyfm 10- https://imgur.com/gallery/4IBWVn1 11-https://imgur.com/gallery/Q2WKIPi 12 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KkoK6mb 13- https://imgur.com/gallery/A3PI7ur 14- https://imgur.com/gallery/z8a2fuX 15 - https://imgur.com/gallery/59sfisF 16 - https://imgur.com/gallery/uvZueER 17 - https://imgur.com/gallery/Dmi0hX3 18 - https://imgur.com/gallery/5qbONFr 19 - https://imgur.com/gallery/yQAj164
